title: CSV file loading not fully implemented
evidence: src/data.rs load functions exist but TASK.md lists 6 required CSV files; code supports partial loading
suggestion: Verify all 6 CSV files can be loaded from data/kaggle/ directory

title: MCP server not started automatically
evidence: src/main.rs:542 - main() function is minimal; no MCP protocol handshake visible
suggestion: Implement full MCP server initialization and JSON-RPC 2.0 protocol handling

title: Player data queries incomplete
evidence: src/query.rs has match queries and team stats; player filtering methods less developed
suggestion: Add comprehensive player filtering by nationality, club, and position as specified in TASK.md

title: Cross-file queries not demonstrated
evidence: No tests shown combining player + match data queries as per TASK.md:344
suggestion: Add integration tests for cross-dataset analysis (e.g., players from winning teams)

title: Query performance not validated
evidence: Tests exist but no timing assertions for <2s or <5s response times per TASK.md:337-339
suggestion: Add performance benchmarks to verify query response times meet SLAs

title: 5 clippy warnings prevent compilation with -D warnings
suggestion: Use std::io::Error::other() instead of Error::new(ErrorKind::Other, ...); apply is_none_or and remove unnecessary borrows

title: MCP resources/tools defined and working
evidence: src/mcp.rs defines multiple tools: match_history, team_stats, player_info, etc.
suggestion: Continue refining tool responses to match natural language expectations from TASK.md examples

title: Team name normalization implemented but may not cover all variations
evidence: src/normalize.rs exists with normalization logic; handles state suffixes and common variations
suggestion: Test against full dataset to ensure all team name variants from 6 CSV sources normalize correctly

title: 27 tests passing with good coverage
evidence: cargo test: 18+9=27 tests passed in 2.60s + 2.04s; 0 ignored; 100% pass rate
suggestion: Continue adding tests for edge cases (missing data, malformed dates, invalid team names)
